scenario.context: Station 03 of the day run: capture and secure the objective of a customer order.
scenario.mission: You refine requirements, close gaps, and derive a clear acceptance picture.

station.profile: Requirements capture, target picture, acceptance criteria

customerRequest.subject: Station 03: Objectives and scope
customerRequest.body: Please capture the customer order precisely, define the scope boundaries, and formulate sound acceptance criteria.

questions.title: Capture requirements cleanly
questions.prompt: Which points belong in a clean order intake? (Multiple choice)

options.text: Name user groups and core processes

feedback.correct: Correct: The intake is structured and practical.
feedback.wrong: Partly wrong: Please pay more attention to clarity and scope boundaries.

questions.title: Define the acceptance picture
questions.prompt: Which wording is best suited as an acceptance criterion?

options.text: The solution should work well overall
options.rationale: Too imprecise and hard to verify.

options.text: VIP tickets must become visibly prioritized in under 2 minutes
Users should be as satisfied as possible
options.rationale: Not robust without a measurement criterion.

feedback.correct: Correct: The criterion is concrete and testable.
feedback.wrong: Not suitable: Acceptance criteria must be formulated measurably.

questions.title: From need to scope
questions.prompt: Put the flow from requirements capture to scope approval in order.

feedback.correct: Correct: The scope process is structured cleanly.
feedback.wrong: Not ideal: Please clarify and prioritize first, then define acceptance criteria and approval.

questions.title: Estimate requirement volume
questions.prompt: The backlog contains 14 must-have requirements and 9 nice-to-have requirements. How many requirements are captured in total?

feedback.wrong: Please add must-have and nice-to-have requirements correctly.

questions.title: Formulate the objective compactly
questions.prompt: Formulate a clear target picture with scope boundary and acceptance criterion in 4-6 sentences.
questions.expectedOutline: Clear goal, explicit non-goals, and at least one measurable criterion.

feedback.correct: Correct: The target picture is formulated soundly.
feedback.wrong: Please work out the goal, boundary, and acceptance criterion more clearly.
